subcodes.first_line: The pebble hath indeed testified unto God, the Lord of Names and Attributes, yet the people of allusions have deprived themselves of His fragrances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهدت الحصاه لله مالک الاسماء و الصفات ولکن اهل الاشارات منعوا عن نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @wisdom [hikmat], @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
